name: context-forge
description: Token-waste reduction (skills, hooks, status line) combined with DB-backed project scaffolding, changelog tracking, and template back-mapping via MCP.

plugins.name: context-forge
plugins.description: Two-half plugin: 15 skills + 1 agent + session-start hook for token-waste reduction, plus a forge-db MCP server, 3 slash commands, and a PostToolUse hook for DB-backed scaffolding.
